data.name: Text_SettingsHubSubtitle
data.value: Configure approvals, general preferences, and system metadata from one place

data.name: Text_HowApprovalsWork
data.value: For each approvable entity (Improvement, Change Request, …) pick who approves new submissions. You can require one or two levels, and each level can be either the submitter's direct manager or a specific user. Changes take effect immediately for new submissions.

data.name: Help_RequireApproval
data.value: When enabled, new submissions are locked until the chosen approvers act.

data.name: Help_DirectManager
data.value: Uses the submitter's line manager from the HR data

data.name: Help_SpecificUser
data.value: Route to a named person regardless of the submitter

data.name: Help_Level2
data.value: Optional. Enable to add a second signature after Level 1 approves.

data.name: Placeholder_SearchUser
data.value: Search by name, email, or department…

data.name: Text_GeneralSettingsLink
data.value: General application settings (name, language, session, upload limits, email) live in the System Settings page.

data.name: Confirm_ResetApproval
data.value: Reset approval configuration for this entity? New submissions will fall back to the default approver.

data.name: Confirm_DeleteRule
data.value: Delete this rule? This cannot be undone.

data.name: Text_HowMultiRuleApprovals
data.value: Each entity can have many approval rules, each triggered by a condition on cost, impact, horizon, innovation type, or duration. When a submission arrives, rules are evaluated in priority order and the first matching rule is used. A rule with no conditions is a catch-all fallback.

data.name: Recipe_QuickWin
data.value: Quick Win: Cost savings < 50,000 AED → Section Head (1 level)

data.name: Recipe_Standard
data.value: Standard: Cost savings 50k–500k OR Impact 6–8 → Department Head + Quality Governance (2 levels)

data.name: Recipe_Strategic
data.value: Strategic: Cost savings 500k–2M OR Horizon 2 → Excellence Committee (2 levels)

data.name: Recipe_Transformative
data.value: Transformative: Cost savings ≥ 2M OR Innovation Type = Transformative → Deputy DG → DG (2 levels)

data.name: Text_NoRulesYet
data.value: No rules configured for this entity yet

data.name: Help_WhenApplies
data.value: Leave a field empty to ignore it. A rule with all conditions empty acts as a catch-all fallback.

data.name: Help_GeneralSettings
data.value: Core system preferences. Dedicated tabs own email, alerts, integrations, approvals and data import keys.

data.name: Confirm_DeleteSetting
data.value: Delete this setting? This cannot be undone.

data.name: Help_SmtpDisabledNote
data.value: Email sending is a fallback channel — in-app SignalR notifications work regardless of SMTP status.

data.name: Help_SmtpPresets
data.value: Use STARTTLS on port 587 for most providers. App-level passwords are required for Microsoft/Google accounts with 2FA.

data.name: Help_ReminderCadence
data.value: How often the MeasurementReminderHostedService scans for due readings and notifies measurement owners.

data.name: Help_QuietHours
data.value: Notifications queued during this window are delivered the next morning.

data.name: Label_EnableDailyDigest
data.value: Send a morning digest instead of instant emails

data.name: Help_DailyDigest
data.value: Bundles all non-critical notifications into one email sent at 08:00 local time.

data.name: Toast_TestSent
data.value: Test email queued (stub — real delivery requires SMTP credentials)

data.name: Help_AiAssistant
data.value: Controls the chat assistant and process analyzer. Requires an API key to be supplied for the chosen model.

data.name: Help_AiRelearn
data.value: How often the VectorSyncBackgroundService rebuilds the embedding store from ESEMS entities.

data.name: Help_VectorStore
data.value: Where embeddings are stored for semantic search.

data.name: Toast_RelearnQueued
data.value: Relearn triggered — VectorSync will pick it up on next tick

data.name: Help_DataImport
data.value: Upload Excel files to bulk-load the most common entities, or export existing rows for external analysis.

data.name: Help_DataImportWorkflow
data.value: Recommended workflow: download the template → fill rows → upload. For row-level validation feedback use the full Import page.

data.name: Help_ImportServices
data.value: Service catalog entries with owners and SLAs

data.name: Help_ImportAssets
data.value: Asset inventory with categories and maintenance plans

data.name: Help_ImportRisks
data.value: Enterprise risks with severity and treatments

data.name: Help_Export
data.value: Download the current rows as Excel. Useful for backups and offline analysis.

data.name: Text_SystemInformationSubtitle
data.value: One-page snapshot of what's inside the system right now

data.name: Text_RoleGroupsSubtitle
data.value: Bundle permissions into reusable groups scoped by organization

data.name: Help_RoleGroups
data.value: Assign users to a group instead of to individual permissions. Scope controls what rows members can see.

data.name: Banner_RoleGroupsPreview_Body
data.value: These role groups let you design rich permission matrices for the future (what a Quality Officer, Process Owner, etc. should be allowed to do across each module). Nothing checks against them yet — actual user access is controlled by the {0} page, where ASP.NET roles like ADMIN/EDITOR/VIEWER are assigned to users. Use this tab to draft the target permission model; we'll wire it into policy enforcement in a later iteration.

data.name: Banner_RoleManagementActive_Body
data.value: These are the ASP.NET roles that gate every page in the app. Assign them to users via User Management. The richer permission matrix lives under {0} as a design preview.

data.name: Help_ImpactEffortScore
data.value: Impact × Effort composite score — used for prioritization

data.name: Text_FormValidationFailed
data.value: Please fix the highlighted issues before saving

data.name: Toast_TransitionBlockedFallback
data.value: This transition isn't permitted by the workflow.

data.name: Text_HelpHubSubtitle
data.value: Quick starts, guides, FAQs, and the full user manual in one place

data.name: Help_QuickStart_AiAssistant_Desc
data.value: Chat with the built-in AI for instant answers

data.name: Help_Guide_Processes
data.value: Model processes, services, categories, and the L0-L4 hierarchy

data.name: Help_Guide_Improvements
data.value: Propose, track, measure, review, and close improvement initiatives

data.name: Help_Guide_Risks
data.value: Log, assess, and treat enterprise risks

data.name: Help_Guide_Services
data.value: Define service catalog entries, SLAs, and owners

data.name: Help_Guide_Settings
data.value: Configure approvals, role groups, data exports, and integrations

data.name: Help_FAQ_1_Q
data.value: How do I submit an improvement initiative for approval?

data.name: Help_FAQ_1_A
data.value: Create it via the Wizard, open the Details page, and click "Submit for Approval". It will route to the approver configured in Settings Hub → Approvals.

data.name: Help_FAQ_2_Q
data.value: How does the approval workflow pick the approver?

data.name: Help_FAQ_2_A
data.value: Settings Hub → Approvals lets you define multi-rule routing (by cost, impact, horizon, innovation type, or duration). The first matching rule wins.

data.name: Help_FAQ_3_Q
data.value: Where do I record a measurement reading?

data.name: Help_FAQ_3_A
data.value: Open an initiative's Details page, go to the Measurements tab, and click the "+ Add Measurement" or "Record Reading" button.

data.name: Help_FAQ_4_Q
data.value: How do I export data for external analysis?

data.name: Help_FAQ_4_A
data.value: Use Settings Hub → Data tab for bulk export, or the "DGEP Export" button on the Roadmap page for the 4Gen Excellence submission format.

data.name: Help_UserManual_Desc
data.value: Downloadable PDF covering every feature in depth

data.name: Help_ContactSupport_Desc
data.value: Can't find what you need? Reach the ESEMS support team directly.

data.name: Confirm_DeleteRoleGroup
data.value: Delete this role group? This cannot be undone.

data.name: Help_PermissionMatrix
data.value: Grant permissions by checking cells. Use the column or row checkboxes to select/deselect entire actions or modules at once.

data.name: Text_CreateFirstUnit
data.value: Create your first unit to start building the hierarchy.

data.name: Help_RecentActivity
data.value: The 50 most recent audit events. Use the full audit log page for advanced filters and AI summaries.

data.name: Placeholder_RuleName
data.value: e.g. Quick Win, Strategic Review, Transformative

data.name: Help_RuleName
data.value: A friendly name for this rule, shown in the rules table.

data.name: Help_Priority
data.value: Lower numbers are tried first. Use 10–90 for specific rules and 100+ for fallbacks.

data.name: Help_DurationBand
data.value: Calculated from initiative creation to target date.

data.name: Footer_ESEMS
data.value: Mohammed Bin Rashid Housing - Enterprise Service Excellence Management System

data.name: Alt_LogoEntity
data.value: Mohammed Bin Rashid Housing Establishment logo

data.name: Alt_LogoSystem
data.value: Enterprise Service Excellence Management System logo

data.name: Confirm_ClearCacheText
data.value: This clears locally stored data and reloads the page. Unsaved changes may be lost.

data.name: Js_KeyFormatInvalid
data.value: Key format is invalid — use a letter followed by letters / digits / dots / dashes / underscores.

data.name: AccessDenied_Text
data.value: You do not have the required permissions to access this page. Please contact your system administrator.

data.name: Lockout_Text
data.value: Your account has been temporarily locked due to multiple failed login attempts. Please try again later or contact support.

data.name: Text_QuadrantAnalysis_Subtitle
data.value: Prioritize initiatives based on impact and effort analysis

data.name: Text_ProcessArchitecture_Subtitle
data.value: APQC-aligned view of process categories, groups, and business processes

data.name: Text_ManageProcessClassificationCategories
data.value: Define and manage top-level process classification categories

data.name: Text_CreateNewAPQCCategory
data.value: Define a new APQC Level 1 process category

data.name: Text_ManageAPQCProcessGroups_Level2
data.value: Organize processes into logical groups within each category

data.name: Text_ManageOperationalProcesses
data.value: Define and document operational business processes

data.name: Text_ManageOrganizationServices
data.value: Manage the organization's service offerings and SLAs

data.name: Text_ManageChangeRequests
data.value: Track and manage process and service change requests

data.name: Confirm_DeleteTextPrefix
data.value: You are about to permanently delete

data.name: Text_SubmitChangeRequest
data.value: Submit a formal change request for process or service modification

data.name: Prompt_RejectionReasonPlaceholder
data.value: Please provide a reason for rejection...

data.name: Audit_HelpText
data.value: Monitor system activity, track changes, and review audit trails

data.name: The field {0} must be a string with a maximum length of {1}.
data.value: This field exceeds the maximum length ({1}).

data.name: The field {0} must be a string or array type with a maximum length of '{1}'.
data.value: This field exceeds the maximum length ({1}).

data.name: The field {0} must be a string or array type with a minimum length of '{1}'.
Hint_OwningUnitLocked
data.value: Owning unit can only be changed by an administrator.

data.name: The field {0} must be between {1} and {2}.
The {0} field is not a valid e-mail address.
Success_ImprovementReturned
data.value: Initiative returned to submitter for changes.

data.name: Error_ResponsibilityNameRequired
data.value: Both English and Arabic titles are required (min 3 characters).

data.name: Error_RoleHasUsers
data.value: Cannot delete role that has users assigned to it.

data.name: Error_DatabaseBackup
data.value: Error occurred while backing up database.

data.name: Error_NotFound
data.value: The requested item was not found.

data.name: Error_ProcessingRequest
data.value: An error occurred while processing your request.

data.name: Error_InvalidMermaidCode
data.value: AI did not return valid Mermaid code.

data.name: Error_InvalidVisioFile
data.value: AI could not generate valid BPMN from Visio file.

data.name: Error_ChangeRequestNotEditable
data.value: This change request can no longer be edited — it has already been approved, implemented, or cancelled.

data.name: Error_ProcessOrServiceRequired
data.value: Please select a Process or a Service.

data.name: Error_AtLeastOneMeasurementRequired
data.value: Please add at least one measurement.

data.name: Error_MeasurementMustHaveUnitAndName
data.value: Each measurement must have a Unit and a Name (English or Arabic).

data.name: Error_TargetsAndAsIsMustMatchMeasurements
data.value: Targets and As-Is values must be provided for all measurements.

data.name: Dashboard_OverviewDescription
data.value: Enterprise performance overview and key metrics

data.name: Hint_ForgotPasswordContactAdmin
data.value: Contact your administrator to reset your password.

data.name: Text_ManageImprovementInitiatives
data.value: Plan, track, and manage continuous improvement initiatives

data.name: Text_CreateOrganizationUnitSubtitle
data.value: Create an organization unit within the hierarchy

data.name: Text_OrganizationalHierarchy
data.value: Organizational hierarchy and ownership across the system

data.name: Text_AIAssistantDescription
data.value: Get AI-powered insights and recommendations for your processes, risks, and strategic planning

data.name: Text_AIWelcomeMessage
data.value: Hello! I'm your AI assistant for ESEMS. I can help you with process improvements, risk analysis, strategic planning, and more. How can I assist you today?

data.name: Prompt_ProcessImprovement
data.value: How can I improve my business processes?

data.name: Prompt_RiskAnalysis
data.value: Help me analyze and mitigate risks in my processes

data.name: Prompt_StrategicPlanning
data.value: What strategic objectives should I focus on?

data.name: Prompt_ISOCompliance
data.value: What are the key requirements for ISO compliance in process management? Help me understand ISO 9001, ISO 20000, ISO 31000, and ISO 55001 standards and how ESEMS supports them.

data.name: Action_BPMNModelingDesc
data.value: Learn BPMN 2.0 notation and best practices

data.name: Prompt_BPMNModeling
data.value: Explain BPMN 2.0 notation and how to model business processes effectively. What are pools, lanes, gateways, and message flows? When should I use collaboration diagrams?

data.name: Action_IncidentManagementDesc
data.value: Handle incidents and root cause analysis

data.name: Prompt_IncidentManagement
data.value: How should I handle incident management in ESEMS? Explain the incident lifecycle, SLA tracking, escalation procedures, and how to perform root cause analysis for problem management.

data.name: Prompt_AssetManagement
data.value: How do I manage assets effectively in ESEMS? Explain asset lifecycle management, maintenance scheduling (preventive, corrective, predictive), and ISO 55001 best practices.

data.name: Action_SLAManagementDesc
data.value: Define and track service level agreements

data.name: Prompt_SLAManagement
data.value: How do I define and track SLAs in ESEMS? Explain service level agreement best practices, breach management, and how to measure service performance metrics.

data.name: Prompt_CustomerFeedback
data.value: How should I handle customer feedback in ESEMS? Explain how to categorize complaints, suggestions, and compliments, perform root cause analysis, and implement corrective actions.

data.name: Text_AIDiagramsDescription
data.value: Generate professional diagrams using AI - flowcharts, org charts, workflows, and more

data.name: Text_SelectDiagramTypeToStart
data.value: Select a diagram type to get started

data.name: Placeholder_DiagramDescription
data.value: Describe what you want to visualize...

data.name: Text_PleaseProvideDetails
data.value: Please provide both title and description

data.name: Text_DefineNewProcess
data.value: Define a new process in the architecture

data.name: Text_SubmitNewChangeRequest
data.value: Submit a formal change request for review

data.name: Text_DefineNewOrganizationUnit
data.value: Define a new organization unit in the structure

data.name: Validation_Email
data.value: Please enter a valid email address.

data.name: Validation_MaxLength
data.value: Please enter no more than {0} characters.

data.name: Validation_Range
data.value: Please enter a value between {0} and {1}.

data.name: AI_AnalyzingData
data.value: Analyzing dashboard data with Azure OpenAI...

data.name: BPMN_Ready
data.value: Ready - Drag elements from the left palette to create your diagram

data.name: BPMN_MovingElement
data.value: Moving element... (Hold Shift to disable snapping)

data.name: BPMN_ReadyEdit
data.value: Ready - Drag elements from the palette or click existing elements to edit

data.name: BPMN_NewDiagramConfirm
data.value: Create a new diagram? Current changes will be lost.

data.name: BPMN_SelectElements
data.value: Select one or more elements first

data.name: Text_ProcessHierarchyDescription
data.value: Browse processes organized by organizational structure

data.name: Confirm_RestoreVersion
data.value: Are you sure you want to restore this version? This will create a new version with the restored content.

data.name: Text_ClickCellToViewRisks
data.value: Click a cell to view risks

data.name: Text_SLAComplianceMonitoring
data.value: Real-time SLA monitoring and breach alerts

data.name: Text_ProcessAnalyzerDescription
data.value: Comprehensive AI-powered analysis of your processes with actionable recommendations

data.name: Placeholder_SelectProcessGroup
data.value: -- Select a process group to analyze --

data.name: Text_AnalyzingProcess
data.value: Analyzing process... This may take a moment.

data.name: Text_SelectProcessToAnalyze
data.value: Select a process from the list to start AI-powered analysis

data.name: Text_ManageIncidents
data.value: Track and manage incidents across services

data.name: Text_ManageProblems
data.value: Identify root causes and manage known errors

data.name: Placeholder_RootCauseAnalysis
data.value: Describe the initial root cause analysis...

data.name: Text_ManageSLAs
data.value: Define and monitor service level agreements

data.name: Text_CreateNewSLA
data.value: Create a new service level agreement

data.name: Text_ManageEnterpriseRisks
data.value: Identify, assess, and manage enterprise-level risks

data.name: Text_AddNewRisk
data.value: Add a new enterprise risk assessment

data.name: Placeholder_CurrentControls
data.value: Describe existing controls and mitigation measures...

data.name: Text_ManageCustomerFeedback
data.value: Manage and respond to customer feedback

data.name: Text_ManageAssets
data.value: Manage organizational assets, maintenance schedules, and lifecycle tracking

data.name: Text_AddNewAsset
data.value: Add a new asset to the system

data.name: Error_CategoryHasAssets
data.value: Cannot delete category that has assets assigned to it

data.name: Text_RoadmapSubtitle
data.value: Auto-generated roadmap from quadrant analysis — prioritized left to right

data.name: Text_Phase1Desc
data.value: High Impact • Low Effort — Execute immediately

data.name: Text_Phase2Desc
data.value: High Impact • High Effort — Plan and execute in stages

data.name: Text_Phase3Desc
data.value: Low Impact • Low Effort — Execute when resources are available

data.name: Text_Phase4Desc
data.value: Low Impact • High Effort — Re-evaluate or defer

data.name: Text_NoMeasurementsDefined
data.value: No measurements defined for this initiative

data.name: Title_ComparisonChart
data.value: Comparison: As-Is vs Target vs To-Be

data.name: Text_Step1Desc
data.value: Pick the process or service you want to improve and describe the initiative.

data.name: Text_Step2Desc
data.value: Add the measurements you will use to track the success of this improvement

data.name: Text_AvailableMeasurementTypes
data.value: Available measurement types: Satisfaction, Cost, Time, Productivity, Capacity, Number of Visits, Number of Documents, Custom

data.name: Text_Step3Desc
data.value: For each measurement, enter the current (baseline) value and the value you want to reach.

data.name: Text_Step4Desc
data.value: Enter the current (baseline) value for each measurement

data.name: Text_Step5Desc
data.value: Score the initiative against business readiness and business value criteria.

data.name: Text_Step6Desc
data.value: Add the team members responsible for this initiative and the actions they will take.

data.name: Text_Step7Desc
data.value: Enter projected To-Be values and review the comparison

data.name: Help_ImprovementJourney
data.value: The Continuous Improvement Journey follows 5 steps: Identify → Analyze → Plan → Execute → Monitor

data.name: Help_QuadrantAnalysis
data.value: Initiatives are automatically categorized based on Impact (1-10) vs Effort (1-10) scores into 4 quadrants

data.name: Help_QuickWins
data.value: High Impact + Low Effort = Quick Wins. These should be prioritized first (0-6 months)

data.name: Help_MajorProjects
data.value: High Impact + High Effort = Major Projects. Strategic initiatives requiring significant resources (6-18 months)

data.name: Help_FillIns
data.value: Low Impact + Low Effort = Fill-Ins. Easy improvements to fill gaps (18-30 months)

data.name: Help_ThanklessTasks
data.value: Low Impact + High Effort = Thankless Tasks. Avoid or defer these (30+ months)

data.name: Help_ImpactScore
data.value: Rate the business impact from 1 (minimal) to 10 (transformational). Consider customer satisfaction, cost savings, and strategic alignment

data.name: Help_EffortScore
data.value: Rate the implementation effort from 1 (very easy) to 10 (very complex). Consider time, resources, and technical complexity

data.name: Help_PrioritizationScore
data.value: Automatically calculated from 9 weighted criteria: Business Readiness (30%) + Business Value (70%)

data.name: Help_InnovationType
data.value: Incremental (small improvements), Breakthrough (significant change), Disruptive (market transformation), Transformative (paradigm shift)

data.name: Help_Measurements
data.value: Define measurable KPIs with As-Is (current), Target (goal), and To-Be (achieved) values to track improvement progress

data.name: Help_AsIsValue
data.value: Current baseline value before improvement (e.g., current processing time: 5 days)

data.name: Help_TargetValue
data.value: Desired goal value after improvement (e.g., target processing time: 2 days)

data.name: Help_ToBeValue
data.value: Actual achieved value after implementation (e.g., achieved processing time: 2.5 days)

data.name: Help_MeasurementWeight
data.value: Importance weight (0-100%). Higher weight = more important KPI. Total should equal 100%

data.name: Help_KanbanBoard
data.value: Visual workflow board showing initiatives across status columns. Drag cards to update status

data.name: Help_Roadmap
data.value: Auto-generated timeline showing initiatives organized into 4 phases based on Quadrant + Horizon + Priority Score

data.name: Help_RoadmapPhase
data.value: Phase assignment: Base from Quadrant, then adjusted by Horizon (H1: +0, H2: +1, H3: +2 phases)

data.name: Help_StrategicObjective
data.value: Link to organizational strategic goals (e.g., Digital Transformation, Customer Excellence)

data.name: Help_ProcessService
data.value: Link to the specific process or service being improved

data.name: Help_OwningUnit
data.value: Department or unit responsible for implementing this improvement

data.name: Help_Owner
data.value: Individual accountable for the success of this improvement initiative

data.name: Help_EstimatedCostSavings
data.value: Expected financial savings in AED (e.g., reduced operational costs, avoided expenses)

data.name: Help_EstimatedTimeSavings
data.value: Expected time savings in hours per year (e.g., reduced processing time, automation gains)

data.name: Help_BusinessReadiness
data.value: Weighted score (30%) from: Stakeholder Support, Resource Availability, Technical Feasibility

data.name: Help_BusinessValue
data.value: Weighted score (70%) from: Strategic Alignment, Customer Impact, Financial Return, Risk Mitigation, Innovation Potential, Scalability

data.name: Journey_Step1_Desc
data.value: Frontline staff, service owners, quality teams

data.name: Journey_Step4_Desc
data.value: Operational teams, implementation team, IT support

data.name: Journey_Step5_Desc
data.value: Quality office, process owner, governance team

data.name: Text_ViewAllInitiatives
data.value: Browse and filter all improvement initiatives

data.name: Help_TeamRoles
data.value: Assign team members to specific lifecycle roles

data.name: Error_TeamMemberExists
data.value: This user is already assigned to this initiative

data.name: Text_DefineNewActivity
data.value: Define a new activity within a process

data.name: Text_NoActivities
data.value: No activities defined for this process

data.name: Text_DefineNewTask
data.value: Define a new task within an activity

data.name: Text_NoTasks
data.value: No tasks defined for this activity

data.name: Text_HoldCtrlToSelectMultiple
data.value: Hold Ctrl to select multiple services

data.name: Error_DuplicateCode
data.value: A process with this code already exists. Please use a different code.

data.name: Text_BulkImportExport
data.value: Bulk import and export system data

data.name: Text_AddCategorySubtitle
data.value: Add a new category to classify assets

data.name: Text_LogMaintenanceActivity
data.value: Log completed or ongoing maintenance activity

data.name: Text_SetupMaintenanceSchedule
data.value: Set up preventive maintenance schedule for an asset

data.name: Text_AddNewRoleSubtitle
data.value: Add a new role to the system

data.name: Text_UpdateUserSubtitle
data.value: Update user information and role assignments

data.name: Text_ViewUserSubtitle
data.value: View user information and assigned roles

data.name: Text_DownloadTemplatesDesc
data.value: Download Excel templates to prepare your data for import. Each template includes the required columns and sample data.

data.name: Text_ErrorOccurred
data.value: An error occurred while processing your request.

data.name: Text_PrivacyContent
data.value: Use this page to detail your site's privacy policy.

data.name: Label_NoUsersAssigned
data.value: No users assigned to this role

data.name: Error_CategoryInUse
data.value: Cannot delete: {0} process groups and {1} processes still reference this category. Move or delete them first.

data.name: Error_ProcessGroupInUse
data.value: Cannot delete: {0} processes still reference this group. Move or delete them first.

data.name: Error_AssetCategoryHasSubCategories
data.value: Cannot delete: {0} sub-categories still reference this category. Move or delete them first.

data.name: Error_RiskInUse
data.value: Cannot delete: {0} action plans and {1} asset-risk links still reference this risk. Remove them first.

data.name: Error_ConcurrentEdit
data.value: Another user saved this record while you were editing it. Your changes were not saved. Reload the page and re-apply your edits.

data.name: Error_DuplicateSubmit
data.value: This looks like a duplicate of a record you just created. The earlier submission was kept.

data.name: Text_GetStartedCreateUser
data.value: Get started by creating your first user.

data.name: Text_ConfirmDeleteUser
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this user?

data.name: Text_ConfirmDeleteRole
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this role?

data.name: Text_GetStartedCreateRole
data.value: Get started by creating your first role.

data.name: Text_AddNewRoleToSystem
data.value: Add a new role to the system

data.name: Text_UpdateUserInfoRoles
data.value: Update user information and role assignments

data.name: Text_ViewUserInfoRoles
data.value: View user information and assigned roles

data.name: Text_ClearCacheDesc
data.value: Clear application cache to free up memory and resolve issues

data.name: Text_DatabaseBackupDesc
data.value: Create a backup of the database for disaster recovery

data.name: Text_SystemLogsDesc
data.value: View and download system logs for troubleshooting

data.name: Text_ImportDataDesc
data.value: Upload your completed Excel files to import data into the system. Make sure to use the correct template format.

data.name: Text_ExportDataDesc
data.value: Export existing data from the system to Excel format for backup or analysis.

data.name: Text_FollowTemplateFormat
data.value: Ensure your file follows the template format exactly

data.name: Text_RequiredFieldsFilled
data.value: All required fields must be filled

data.name: Text_InvalidDataReported
data.value: Invalid data will be reported after import

data.name: Text_ErrorMessage
data.value: An error occurred while processing your request.

data.name: Text_PrivacyPolicyContent
data.value: Use this page to detail your site's privacy policy.

data.name: Text_LinkToScheduled
data.value: Link to a scheduled maintenance if applicable

data.name: Text_DragDropDescription
data.value: Click and drag any card to move it between status columns. The status will be automatically updated.

data.name: Text_AllRisksLinkedToAsset
data.value: All risks are already linked to this asset.

data.name: Text_AllAssetsLinkedToRisk
data.value: All assets are already linked to this risk.

data.name: Text_AllAssetsLinkedToService
data.value: All assets are already linked to this service.

data.name: Text_AllRisksLinkedToService
data.value: All risks are already linked to this service.

data.name: Error_WindowsUserNotRegistered
data.value: Windows user is not registered in the system.

data.name: Error_WindowsUserInactive
data.value: Your Windows account matches a user that is deactivated. Contact an administrator.

data.name: Error_WindowsLoginFailedDetail
data.value: Windows sign-in failed for {0}. The application login name is "{1}". Ensure Authentication:AutoCreateUsers is true on the server, redeploy the latest build, or ask an admin to create user "{1}" with role VIEWER.

data.name: Error_WindowsAuthNotConfigured
data.value: Windows Authentication is not available. Enable Windows Authentication on the IIS site and ensure you open the site from a domain-joined browser.

data.name: Help_UniqueIdentifier
data.value: Unique identifier for this change request

data.name: Help_SelectAffectedAssets
data.value: Select assets that will be affected by this change request

data.name: Help_SelectRelatedRisks
data.value: Select risks that this change will create, mitigate, or affect

data.name: Help_BusinessReason
data.value: Explain the business reason for this change

data.name: Help_DescribeImpact
data.value: Describe expected impact on processes, services, and stakeholders

data.name: Help_ExternalReference
data.value: Reference ID from external system (if applicable)

data.name: Error_AccountLockedOut
data.value: Too many failed attempts. Please try again in 15 minutes.

data.name: Error_LoadingData
data.value: An error occurred while loading data

data.name: Dashboard_AIInsightsError
data.value: Unable to load insights. Try refreshing.

data.name: ProcessOptimizer_Analyzing
data.value: AI is analyzing process for optimization opportunities...

data.name: Text_AddNewFeedback
data.value: Log a new customer complaint, suggestion, compliment, or inquiry.

data.name: Delegate_Hint
data.value: Leave blank for an indefinite delegation. If set, the approval bounces back automatically after this date.

data.name: Help_AssetDescription
data.value: Description of the asset, its purpose, and key characteristics.

data.name: Help_CurrentControls
data.value: Controls currently in place to manage this risk.

data.name: Text_WorkaroundHelp
data.value: Temporary workaround used to mitigate the problem before the permanent fix.

data.name: Error_UploadMustBeXlsxTemplate
data.value: Upload must be a .xlsx file produced from the template.

data.name: Error_CannotReviewClosedInitiative
data.value: Cannot review a closed or cancelled initiative.

data.name: Error_DeletingUser
data.value: An error occurred while deleting the user.

data.name: Error_NoPendingStepDelegate
data.value: No pending step found to delegate.

data.name: Error_RoleAssignedCannotDelete
data.value: Cannot delete a role that is assigned to users.

data.name: Error_DeletingRole
data.value: An error occurred while deleting the role.

data.name: Error_SelectScenarioAndConfig
data.value: Select at least one scenario and a target configuration.

data.name: Error_PrivacyConsentRequired
data.value: Privacy consent is required before personal data can be submitted.

data.name: Text_ContactInfoMasked
data.value: Personal data is masked. Click to reveal — your access is logged for audit.

data.name: Text_CR_WaitingOnReviewer
data.value: Submitted — waiting for a reviewer to pick this up.

data.name: Text_CR_WaitingOnApprover
data.value: Under review — waiting for an approver decision.

data.name: Text_CR_WaitingOnImplementer
data.value: Approved — waiting for the implementer to mark it done.

data.name: Text_CR_TerminalRejected
data.value: This change request was rejected. No further actions available.

data.name: Text_CR_TerminalImplemented
data.value: This change request has been implemented. No further actions available.

data.name: Text_CR_TerminalCancelled
data.value: This change request was cancelled. No further actions available.
